page_metadata.biotools__summary: BioViz Connect, a middleware Web application that links CyVerse science gateway resources to the Integrated Genome Browser (IGB), a highly interactive native application implemented in Java that runs on the user’s personal computer.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BioViz Connect, a middleware Web application that links CyVerse science gateway resources to the Integrated Genome Browser (IGB), a highly interactive native application implemented in Java that runs on the user’s personal computer.
